titleStmt.title: SII 36.278: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 278. (A.R. No. 278 of 1910.) TIRUVAḌANDAI, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Varāha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: Gift of one aṉṟāḍu-naṟ-kācu by Paṅkanūṟ Chāṇi Chani, a brāhmaṇa lady of Chirudavūr for sacred food offerings to be provided during the ēkādasi day in the month of Mārkaḻi to the presiding deity in the temple of Tiruviḍavandai, a dēvadāṉa-brahmadēya of Paḍuvūr-nāḍu a subdivision of Āmūrk-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. The money was received by 8 members of the family of Iḷaṅkīraṉ from the locality and they agreed to provide the sacred food as stipulated.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpan nilamakaḷṇilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Uri
mayiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi mīnavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara vikkalan ciṅṇaṉ melkaṭal pā
ya tikkaṉaittutan cakkaranaṭātti vijaiyabhiṣekam paṇṇi vīrasimhāsanattu puva
namuḻutuṭaiyāḷḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya korājakeśaripanmarāna cakravattikaḷ śrī
kulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 7 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu Ā
mūrk koṭṭattu paṭuvūr nāṭṭu devadāna brahmadeya tiruviṭavantai Āḻvānukku meṟpaṭi Ā
mūr nāṭṭu ciṟutavūr brāhmaṇi paṅkanūṟ cāṇicāni mārkaḻi tiruvekādaci nāḷ tiruviṭavantai Āḻvānu
kku Amutu ceyvikkukaikku Ivaḷ kuṭutta kācu Onṟu Anṟāṭu naṟkācu 1 nṟu koṇṭom Ivvūr veḷḷāḷa
iḷaṅkīraṉ kuṭiyom ci Araṅkanum Ikkuṭi cuppanamāntaiyum Aruṉaiyum ponṉaiyum Ikkuṭi Araṅ
kaṉ mātaiyum kūḷaṉ celvanum paiyyanamanātittanum kaṭuvan cāttan Araṅkaṉ panṟiyum
Ivaṉaivomum brāmaṇi cānicāṇi Iṭaikkoṇṭa kācāl van=ta vratti Iraṇṭu cuttamaliyāl Amutu cey
vikka munniṉṟāre kaṭavomānom
Digital edition of SII 36.278 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
